Map Viewer

The Map Viewer allows users to interact with geographic and temporal datasets within miraX.

Features

  • Zoom and navigation
  • Layer visualization
  • Feature interaction
  • Spatial exploration
  • Temporal visualization

View Controls

  • Zoom controls
  • Search bar
  • Legend
  • Grid
  • Coordinates
  • Scale bar

Layer Management

Users can:

  • Toggle layers on/off
  • Compare spatial datasets
  • Visualize raster and vector layers
  • Explore temporal datasets

Basemaps

Available basemaps may include:

  • Satellite imagery
  • Terrain maps
  • Light and dark themes
  • Topographic maps

Feature Interaction

Interactive tools support:

  • Feature inspection
  • Metadata visualization
  • Spatial measurements
  • Drawing tools

Advanced Visualization

3D View

Explore terrain in three dimensions.

Time Layers

Visualize temporal raster and forecast datasets.

Side-by-Side

Compare datasets visually.
